problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: The key to Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? is Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine — specifically Cortical spreading depression — which would help 12,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
